name: Heavy Duty Online UPS 5KVA (IGBT)
description: Su-vastika Heavy Duty Online UPS 5KVA (IGBT Based) is a 180V / 5KVA (4KW) true online double-conversion UPS with IGBT technology. Designed for motors, compressors, sensitive IT loads and any load requiring zero transfer time. Built-in isolation transformer, LCD display, generator compatible, manual bypass via rotary switch. 18KW lithium battery provides 4 hours 30 minutes backup at full load.
short_description: Online 5KVA / 4KW IGBT UPS for motors, compressors and IT loads.

name: Heavy Duty Online UPS 10.5KVA (IGBT)
description: Su-vastika Heavy Duty Online UPS 10.5KVA (IGBT Based) delivers 180V / 10.5KVA (8KW) true online power with IGBT technology. Zero transfer time, built-in isolation transformer, LCD display and generator compatibility. 18KW lithium battery rating provides 2 hours 15 minutes backup at full load.
short_description: Online 10.5KVA / 8KW IGBT UPS for industrial and IT applications.

name: Heavy Duty UPS 10.5KVA (IGBT) 3P-3P
description: Su-vastika Heavy Duty UPS 10.5KVA (IGBT Based) 3P-3P operates at 180V three-phase with 10KVA / 8KW output. For factories, industrial machinery and commercial three-phase infrastructure requiring clean constant-frequency power.
short_description: Three-phase 10KVA / 8KW IGBT UPS for industrial three-phase loads.

name: LiFePO4 Retrofit Battery 10 KW
description: Su-vastika LiFePO4 Retrofit Battery 10KW is the largest retrofit unit at 96V / 10KWh, compatible with 96V inverters up to 8000W. Provides approximately 1 hour backup at 10KW load. Intelligent BMS with 5 key features: cell balancing, SOC monitoring, SOH tracking, real-time app monitoring and safety automation. Rated capacity 100Ah, CC-CV charging, max 25A charge current.
short_description: 96V / 10KWh for any 96V inverter up to 8000W.

name: LiFePO4 Retrofit Battery 1280 Wh
description: Su-vastika LiFePO4 Retrofit Battery 1280Wh operates at 12.8V and is compatible with any 12V inverter/UPS up to 900W. Replaces a standard 150Ah tubular battery at just 14.2 kg — 1/3 the weight. Wall-mountable (no trolley needed). Smart BMS with cell balancing, SOC/SOH monitoring, real-time app tracking, sleep mode for extended outages, MCB back-protection and Anderson connector for polarity safety. 3000+ cycle life, 7–10 year lifespan, charges in 4–5 hours.
short_description: 12.8V / 1280Wh drop-in replacement for any 12V inverter up to 900W.

name: LiFePO4 Retrofit Battery 2.56 KWh
description: Su-vastika LiFePO4 Retrofit Battery 2.56KWh delivers 25.6V / 2.56KWh energy storage compatible with any 24V inverter/UPS up to 2000W. Drop-in replacement for dual 150Ah tubular batteries. Features patented smart BMS, sleep mode, thermal seal for performance, MCB protection and Anderson connectors. 3500+ cycle life with CC-CV charging.
short_description: 25.6V / 2.56KWh for any 24V inverter up to 2000W.

name: LiFePO4 Retrofit Battery 5.12 KWh
description: Su-vastika LiFePO4 Retrofit Battery 5.12KWh operates at 51.2V and works with any 48V inverter/UPS up to 4000W. Provides up to 4 hours backup at 1200W or 1 hour 10 minutes at 4000W load. Smart BMS, patented sleep mode, thermal management and MCB protection built in.
short_description: 51.2V / 5.12KWh for any 48V inverter up to 4000W.

name: Lift Inverter / ERD 10KVA
description: Su-vastika Emergency Rescue Device (ERD) / Lift Inverter 10KVA is designed for non-regenerative lifts with motor rating up to 3.7KW (1 lift). Operates at 180V / 10KVA three-phase with 18KW lithium battery, providing 4 hours 40 minutes of backup. IGBT-based, built-in isolation transformer, LCD display with Bluetooth/Wi-Fi remote monitoring. Compliant with BIS standards for lift safety. Patented technology.
short_description: 10KVA ERD for lifts with motor up to 3.7KW — 4 hrs 40 mins backup.

name: Lift Inverter / ERD 15KVA
description: Su-vastika ERD / Lift Inverter 15KVA handles non-regenerative lifts with motor up to 7.5KW (1 lift). 180V / 15KVA three-phase with 18KW lithium battery, providing 2 hours 15 minutes backup. Instantaneous switchover prevents passengers from being stranded during power failure. IGBT-based with LCD display and remote monitoring.
short_description: 15KVA ERD for lifts with motor up to 7.5KW — 2 hrs 15 mins backup.

name: Lift Inverter / ERD 20KVA
description: Su-vastika ERD / Lift Inverter 20KVA is rated for non-regenerative lifts with motor up to 11.5KW (1 lift). 180V / 20KVA three-phase with 18KW lithium battery providing 1 hour 30 minutes backup. For larger passenger and freight lifts in commercial buildings and hotels.
short_description: 20KVA ERD for lifts with motor up to 11.5KW — 1 hr 30 mins backup.

name: Lift Inverter / ERD 30KVA
description: Su-vastika ERD / Lift Inverter 30KVA is the most powerful ERD unit, rated for non-regenerative lifts up to 15KW motor (1 lift). Operates at 360V / 30KVA three-phase with 36KW lithium battery providing 2 hours 10 minutes backup. For high-speed, high-capacity passenger and service lifts in large commercial complexes, hospitals and industrial buildings.
short_description: 30KVA ERD for lifts with motor up to 15KW — 2 hrs 10 mins backup.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS 1800
description: The Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS 1800 delivers 24V / 1500VA power with 1200W bulb load capacity. Ideal for medium households running multiple fans, lights, refrigerators and computers simultaneously. LED display, instant changeover and built-in isolation transformer included.
short_description: 1500 VA / 1200 W UPS for medium homes and small offices.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS 2300
description: The Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS 2300 is rated at 24V / 2000VA with 1600W bulb load. Handles heavy household loads including inverter ACs, multiple computers and high-wattage appliances. Pure sine wave output ensures no damage to sensitive equipment.
short_description: 2000 VA / 1600 W UPS for large homes and small businesses.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS Li 1050 Combo
description: Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS Li 1050 Combo pairs the 900VA / 640W UPS with a matched 12V / 1280Wh LiFePO4 battery. Everything optimised to work together — no compatibility issues, no lead-acid maintenance. One complete power backup solution for homes. The lithium battery charges 3× faster and lasts 3× longer than tubular alternatives.
short_description: 900 VA UPS + 1280Wh LiFePO4 battery — ready-to-use home backup.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS Li 5500 Combo
description: Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS Li 5500 Combo is a 48V / 5000VA (4000W) UPS matched with a 4.48KWh LiFePO4 battery pack. Ideal for large offices, hotels and commercial establishments. Lithium battery provides significantly longer backup than lead-acid at 1/3 the weight. Built-in smart BMS and zero maintenance operation.
short_description: 5000 VA UPS + 4.48KWh LiFePO4 battery for offices and commercial use.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 1350
description: The Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 1350 operates at 12V / 1200VA (800W). The Automatic Temperature Compensation (ATC) technology optimises battery charging voltage based on ambient temperature — extending battery life by up to 20% in hot Indian climates.
short_description: 1200 VA / 800 W UPS with Automatic Temperature Compensation.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 2500
description: The Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 2500 delivers 24V / 2500VA (2000W) with LCD display and ATC technology. The LCD provides detailed status — battery level, load percentage, input voltage and charging current. Perfect for offices and commercial establishments.
short_description: 2500 VA / 2000 W LCD UPS with ATC — ideal for offices.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 3500
description: Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 3500 provides 24V / 3250VA (2600W) with LCD display and temperature-compensated charging. Handles heavy commercial loads with pure sine wave output.
short_description: 3250 VA / 2600 W LCD UPS for large offices and commercial use.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 4000
description: Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 4000 rated at 48V / 4000VA (3200W). Designed for large commercial establishments, hospitals and factories requiring high-capacity clean power with ATC charging.
short_description: 4000 VA / 3200 W LCD UPS at 48V for high-load applications.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 5500
description: The Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 5500 is the most powerful in the home/commercial UPS range at 48V / 5000VA (4000W). LCD display, ATC, Bluetooth/Wi-Fi monitoring available at extra cost. Handles large motor loads, HVAC systems and critical IT infrastructure.
short_description: 5000 VA / 4000 W LCD UPS — top-of-range for heavy commercial loads.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS 1050
description: The Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS 1050 is the flagship home UPS model. Rated at 12V / 900VA with 640W output, it powers fans, lights, small ACs and computers with a pure sine wave. Built-in isolation transformer protects sensitive loads. Supports ATC for optimal battery charging in all climates.
short_description: 900 VA / 640 W home UPS — most popular model for households.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS 850
description: The Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS 850 is designed for small homes and sensitive appliances. With a 12V / 700VA output and 490W bulb load capacity, it delivers clean pure sine wave power with instant changeover. Features include built-in isolation transformer, MCB for mains protection, automatic bypass, and variable charging from 2.5A to 25A.
short_description: 700 VA / 490 W home UPS with instant changeover and LED display.

name: Solar PCU 10KVA MPPT + LiFePO4 9 KWh
description: Su-vastika 10KVA MPPT with LiFePO4 Battery 9KWh is a 90V / 10KVA (8000W) solar system with a 9KWh lithium battery bank. At 2000W load gives 4 hours 15 minutes; at 8000W gives 1 hour backup. LCD display, 40A MPPT, bi-directional charging and remote monitoring via Bluetooth/Wi-Fi. Ideal for factories, farms and commercial solar setups.
short_description: 10 KVA solar PCU with 9KWh LiFePO4 for commercial solar systems.

name: Solar PCU 10KVA MPPT
description: Su-vastika Solar PCU 10KVA MPPT is a high-capacity 96V / 10KVA (8000W) unit with 40A MPPT and 215 VOC capability — suitable for large solar arrays. LCD display provides comprehensive monitoring. Designed for factories, farms and large commercial installations with significant solar capacity.
short_description: 10 KVA / 8000 W solar PCU at 96V with LCD display and 215 VOC.

name: Solar PCU 2500 MPPT + LiFePO4 2.56 KWh
description: Su-vastika 2500 MPPT BLE with LiFePO4 Battery 2.56KWh combines the 24V / 2500VA solar PCU and a 2.56KWh LiFePO4 battery. Solar-first charging with grid top-up. 400W gives 6 hours backup; 1760W gives 1 hour 20 minutes. Bluetooth/Wi-Fi monitoring, ATC, instant changeover and bi-directional technology included.
short_description: 2500 VA solar PCU with matched 2.56KWh LiFePO4 — solar-first power.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 2000
description: Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS with ATC 2000 delivers 24V / 1700VA (1300W) with ATC technology for climate-adaptive battery charging. Suitable for large homes and small offices with sensitive IT equipment.
short_description: 1700 VA / 1300 W UPS with ATC for homes and offices.

name: Solar PCU 2500 MPPT BLE
description: The Su-vastika Solar PCU 2500 MPPT BLE is a 24V / 2500VA (1760W) solar power conditioning unit with built-in 40A MPPT charge controller (50 VOC). Bi-directional technology enables intelligent sharing of charging current between PV panels and mains grid. ATC ensures optimal charging in all weather. Monitor via Bluetooth/Wi-Fi app. User-settable grid priority via USB.
short_description: 2500 VA solar PCU with 40A MPPT, BLE monitoring and bi-directional technology.

features: User Settable Grid Priority via USB
Intelligent Charging from PV and Mains

name: Solar PCU 5500 MPPT + LiFePO4 5.12 KWh
description: Su-vastika 5500 MPPT BLE with LiFePO4 Battery 5.12KWh is a 48V / 5000VA (4000W) solar system with a 5.12KWh lithium battery. 1200W load gives 4 hours backup; 4000W load gives 1 hour 10 minutes. Bluetooth/Wi-Fi app, bi-directional charging and ATC built in.
short_description: 5000 VA solar PCU with 5.12KWh LiFePO4 for large solar installations.

name: Solar PCU 5500 MPPT BLE
description: Su-vastika Solar PCU 5500 MPPT BLE delivers 48V / 5000VA (4000W) with 40A MPPT controller and 100 VOC open circuit voltage support. Ideal for large homes and commercial establishments looking to maximise solar utilisation. Bi-directional charging from both PV and grid with intelligent priority management.
short_description: 5000 VA solar PCU with 40A MPPT, 100 VOC and BLE/Wi-Fi monitoring.

features: User Settable Grid Priority via USB

name: ESS 10KVA / 9KWh (1P-1P)
description: Su-vastika Battery Energy Storage System 10KVA / 9KWh (1P-1P) provides 90V / 10KVA with 8KW output and 9KWh lithium battery. At 2000W load gives over 4 hours backup. LCD display, intelligent BMS, zero maintenance and remote monitoring. Ideal for homes with solar wanting to store daytime generation for evening use.
short_description: Single-phase 10KVA / 9KWh BESS for homes and small businesses.

name: ESS 15KVA / 18KWh (1P-1P)
description: Su-vastika Battery Energy Storage System 15KVA / 18KWh (1P-1P) operates at 180V / 15KVA with 12KW output and 18KWh lithium battery. Provides over 1 hour 25 minutes at full 12KW load. Designed for medium commercial establishments, hotels and businesses looking to reduce grid dependence and stabilise power.
short_description: Single-phase 15KVA / 18KWh BESS for medium commercial use.

name: BESS 15KVA / 18KWh (3P-3P)
description: Su-vastika BESS 15KVA / 18KWh (3P-3P) operates at 180V three-phase with 15KVA / 12KW and 18KWh lithium battery. Provides 1 hour 30 minutes backup at full 12KW three-phase load. For factories, data centres and large commercial buildings.
short_description: Three-phase 15KVA / 18KWh BESS for heavy commercial use.

name: BESS 30KVA / 36KWh (3P-3P)
description: Su-vastika BESS 30KVA / 36KWh (3P-3P) is the flagship industrial energy storage system at 360V three-phase with 30KVA / 24KW output and 36KWh lithium battery. Provides 1 hour 30 minutes backup at full 24KW load. For large factories, industrial parks and data centres with significant three-phase power requirements.
short_description: Three-phase 30KVA / 36KWh BESS — largest industrial storage unit.

name: BESS 10KVA / 18KWh (3P-3P)
description: Su-vastika Battery Energy Storage System 10KVA / 18KWh (3P-3P) is a three-phase unit at 180V / 10KVA with 8KW output and 18KWh lithium bank. Provides approximately 2 hours 15 minutes backup at full load. Designed for three-phase commercial and industrial applications.
short_description: Three-phase 10KVA / 18KWh BESS for commercial and industrial.

name: Heavy Duty UPS 10KVA (IGBT) 1P-1P
description: Su-vastika Heavy Duty UPS 10KVA (IGBT Based) 1P-1P operates at 96V / 10KVA (8KW). Compatible with lead-acid batteries. IGBT technology, built-in isolation transformer, LCD display, remote monitoring via Bluetooth/Wi-Fi, generator compatible, pure sine wave output with constant voltage and frequency. Manual maintenance bypass via rotary switch.
short_description: Single-phase 10KVA / 8KW IGBT UPS with lead-acid battery compatibility.

name: Heavy Duty UPS 15KVA (IGBT) 1P-1P
description: Su-vastika Heavy Duty UPS 15KVA (IGBT Based) 1P-1P is rated at 180V / 15KVA (12KW). For large commercial and industrial single-phase applications. IGBT technology, isolated transformer, LCD, generator compatible and full Bluetooth/Wi-Fi monitoring.
short_description: Single-phase 15KVA / 12KW IGBT UPS for heavy industrial loads.

name: Heavy Duty UPS 30KVA (IGBT) 3P-3P
description: Su-vastika Heavy Duty UPS 30KVA (IGBT Based) 3P-3P operates at 360V three-phase with 30KVA / 24KW output. The highest-capacity three-phase UPS in the Su-vastika range. For data centres, large factories and industrial parks with critical three-phase power requirements.
short_description: Three-phase 30KVA / 24KW IGBT UPS — largest three-phase unit.

name: Heavy Duty UPS 15KVA (IGBT) 3P-3P
description: Su-vastika Heavy Duty UPS 15KVA (IGBT Based) 3P-3P delivers 180V three-phase with 15KVA / 12KW output. Handles large industrial three-phase loads — manufacturing equipment, HVAC systems, server rooms.
short_description: Three-phase 15KVA / 12KW IGBT UPS for large industrial use.

name: Pure Sine Wave UPS Li 2500 Combo
description: Su-vastika Pure Sine Wave UPS Li 2500 Combo pairs a 24V / 2500VA (2000W) UPS with a 2.24KWh LiFePO4 battery bank. Handles heavy household and small office loads. The integrated lithium battery provides 6 hours at 400W or 1 hour at 2000W. Zero maintenance, instant changeover.
short_description: 2500 VA UPS + 2.24KWh LiFePO4 battery for large homes.
